title: pyrus rivularis var. toringo
intro: Pyrus rivularis var. toringo, also known as Korean pear or baeg.sap, is a variety of the pear tree native to Korea. This plant has been traditionally used in Korean medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus rivularis var. toringo include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Pyrus rivularis var. toringo can be prepared into herbal teas, juices, or infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
